name: The Synapse
subtitle: Where women connect mind, machine, and what comes next

fiscalSponsor.name: Applied Love Labs
fiscalSponsor.blurb: Applied Love Labs / TILT is the fiscal sponsor for The Synapse. Charitable contributions flow through ALL; receipts are issued in ALL's name.

mission: The Synapse convenes women working at the edge of consciousness research, cognitive science, and machine intelligence. We gather to interrogate what these fields mean together -- not as a survey, but as a working conversation that gives early-career researchers a seat at the same table as senior scholars.

principles.title: Real work, not a showcase
principles.body: Sessions are built around substantive argument, not platform-building. Keynotes run forty-five minutes and take real questions.

principles.title: Mentorship is the point
principles.body: Every doctoral attendee is matched with a senior mentor for a thirty-minute conversation during the convening.

principles.title: Interdisciplinary on purpose
principles.body: Every track mixes neuroscience, philosophy, and machine-learning voices. We trust attendees to follow arguments outside their home field.

principles.title: Access is architecture
principles.body: Captioning, step-free navigation, a quiet room, onsite childcare, and a short, honest access form. Not accommodations -- defaults.

placeholderNote: Venue, final dates, registration rates, and speaker roster are placeholders -- see CONTENT_PLACEHOLDER.md. The committee owns final content.
